# Data Model Documentation Instructions

Use this file for work that writes or updates `docs/data-model/`.

## Source of truth

- backend entities and repositories
- migrations under `backend/migrations/` and `backend/src/migrations/`
- `database/` and `db/` artifacts when still relevant

## Cover

- tables and entities
- relationships and ownership
- identity mapping
- migration intent
- persistence constraints that matter to the product or runtime

## Do not confuse with

- API contracts
- operations runbooks
- broad architecture narratives unless a cross-reference is needed
